text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day, I'm walking by the track<n>when I happen
to hear what sounds<n>like a commotion.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Gasp! Th-there's a fight!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
That's something I can't overlook. I<n>rush
towards the source of all the<n>noise, only to find...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Aw yeah, now zat's the spirit! Show<n>me whatcha
got, and don't either of<n>you dare lose!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Aww, what? A draw? How 'bout you<n>two settle
the score with a casual<n>race?!
choice_data_list: You shouldn't be holding races by yourselves.
You shouldn't be holding races by yourselves.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Yowza! You scared me! But don't be<n>such a
buzzkill. These two're in the<n>middle of a fight!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know! Why don'tcha supervise<n>the race?
Then it'll be a nice 'n proper<n>scrimmage!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Oh come on, live a little. Fire and fight<n>is what
makes Edo bright. And seeing<n>that fight in a
scrimmage is what<n>Tracen's all about!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Give the okay and let 'em compete<n>already!
C'mon, we gotta settle this,<n>Edo-style!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And so, I find myself wrangled into<n>overseeing
the scrimmage!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
There ya go, good start! Now look<n>alive and
proud! Feel that sunshine<n>beamin' down on ya!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Go gooo! Close that gap! Hey, you in<n>the lead!
Don't just give up!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Maan, whatta race that was! Came<n>down to a
nose too! And just lookit<n>those bright smiles on
their faces!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Us Umamusume were born for this<n>stuff. Now, to
wrap things up nicely...
choice_data_list: You could finish things with a bang.
You could get them a drink.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Good thinkin'. Then let's finish this<n>with some
stylin' clappin'!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
You two put on one helluva show! As<n>thanks, on
my mark, let's all clap in<n>unison to finish off!
Yooo!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Clap!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Following Inari One's cue, the three<n>of them clap
their hands together in<n>sync, sending a clear
sound ringing<n>through the clear blue sky.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah, nothin' like a cold drink to<n>wash away
any bitter feelings, right?<n>Good thinkin'!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you two! How'd ya like a nice<n>cold drink to
cool off?!
